installCommand: curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://sh.rustup.rs | sh -s -- -y --profile minimal --default-toolchain stable --target wasm32-unknown-unknown && curl -fsSL https://github.com/trunk-rs/trunk/releases/download/v0.21.14/trunk-x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu.tar.gz | tar -xz -C $HOME/.cargo/bin
